privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Odoo inventory management task where a shipment from Mediterranean Provisions Co. must be received and tracked using lot/serial number features. The shipment contains two products: Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg (Lot: WF-2024-1547, Expiry: 2025-06-30, Quantity: 50 units) and Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L (Lot: OO-2024-0893, Expiry: 2025-12-15, Quantity: 30 units). The shipment details are provided in a manifest file at /home/ga/Desktop/shipment_details.txt created by the setup script. All metadata values have been verified against the setup_task.sh script and the generated shipment manifest.
